# @zapier/zapier-sdk-cli-login

Authentication and token management for Zapier SDK CLI tools.

This package handles OAuth login flows, secure token storage, and automatic token refresh for CLI-based interactions with Zapier APIs. It is used internally by [`@zapier/zapier-sdk`](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@zapier/zapier-sdk) to provide seamless authentication.

For usage instructions, see the main SDK documentation at [`@zapier/zapier-sdk`](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@zapier/zapier-sdk).
